title: Add pharmaceutical company partner logos section

requirements.text: Add a 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section to the existing Ghuge Medicals website that displays branded logo tiles for the following companies: Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, and Smart Iconic. Use publicly available logo image URLs from the web where possible; where a reliable URL is unavailable, render a styled branded tile with the company name using the site's blue and green color scheme.

quotes: Newly just add some logos of medician compnies like aqualab,smartway, laborate, cipla, smartlab, smart iconic etc take their logos from netwirk

acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' (or similar) section appears on the page
All six companies are represented: Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, Smart Iconic
Each entry shows either a real logo image or a clean branded fallback tile with the company name
The section uses the existing blue and green color scheme and fits visually with the rest of the page
The section is responsive and displays well on both mobile and desktop

constraints: Do not change the existing page structure, color scheme, or any other sections (About Us, Mission, Contact, Business Hours, Services)
Do not use Google Maps or any map iframes — the location must remain text-only as per existing implementation
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
nonGoals: Adding e-commerce or product catalog functionality
